title: Viners Everyday Purity 4 Piece 18/0 Silver Stainless Steel Forks (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack

CLASSIC CUTLERY | This flatware cutlery pack of dinner forks is enviably stylish. The forks are expertly balanced with simple and smooth, flared handles and an elegant design making it a delight to hold
4 PIECE SET | Add that classic touch to everyday dining with the Everyday Purity collection. This set includes 4 x dinner forks and is the perfect addition to your cutlery collection
STRENGTH & DURABILITY | Made from fine quality 18/0 stainless steel, our cutlery is polished to a mirror finish. The long-lasting set is rust-resistant and can be used in the dishwasher

EVERYDAY DINING | The Everyday Purity range has 4 packs available for each cutlery piece (dinner forks, dinner knives, tea spoons and dessert spoons) and comes in a complete 16 piece set packaged in a beautiful gift box

VINERS ELEGANCE | Viners has existed for over 110 years and has become a much-loved British brand and household name, steeped in heritage. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence - elegant, robust cutlery that comes with up to 50 years guarantees
